results.title: Born to Shine: Jeni's real father | Episode 96
China's summer box office tops $440 million
results.description: China's 2026 summer movie season has generated more than 3 billion yuan (about $440 million) in box office revenue, including advance ticket sales, according to ticketing platform Maoyan.
